sample_tickets.subject: How to import contacts?
sample_tickets.message: Hi, I need to import a large number of contacts from our old system. Can you provide instructions on how to do this?

sample_tickets.subject: API Integration
sample_tickets.message: Hello, need help integrating your API with our system. Is there documentation available?

sample_tickets.subject: Pricing Inquiry
sample_tickets.message: I'm interested in your CRM Pro solution and would like to know more about your pricing plans for 25 users.

sample_tickets.subject: Email template customization
sample_tickets.message: I want to create custom email templates that match our brand colors and add our logo. How can I do this?

sample_tickets.subject: Login issue
sample_tickets.message: Can't login to my CRM account. Password reset didn't work. Please help urgently, I need access for today's client meetings.

sample_tickets.subject: Report generation
sample_tickets.message: We need to generate monthly sales reports with specific filters and data points that match our internal KPIs. Can your system support custom report fields?

sample_tickets.subject: Integration with Outlook
sample_tickets.message: We're having issues with the Outlook integration. Emails are not syncing properly and calendar events are not being tracked. What can we do?

sample_tickets.subject: Account Upgrade
sample_tickets.message: How can I upgrade my account from the Basic plan to the Pro plan? We need more user licenses.

sample_tickets.subject: Security Compliance
sample_tickets.message: Does your CRM system comply with GDPR and SOC 2 requirements? We need to verify before implementing at our organization.

sample_tickets.subject: Bulk email campaigns
sample_tickets.message: I'm trying to send a promotional email to 5000 contacts but it's not working. The system says the limit is exceeded. Is there a workaround?

sample_tickets.subject: Sales pipeline
sample_tickets.message: I need help setting up custom sales stages in the pipeline. Our process is different from the default stages.

sample_tickets.subject: Training Resources
sample_tickets.message: Do you have any training resources or onboarding materials for new users? We just added 10 new team members.

sample_tickets.subject: Data export
sample_tickets.message: I need to export all customer data for our quarterly review. How do I export data in a format compatible with Excel?

sample_tickets.subject: Lost access
sample_tickets.message: I lost my phone and can't access my account because of 2FA. How can I reset it?

sample_tickets.subject: Mobile app
sample_tickets.message: When will you release the mobile app for iOS? Our sales team needs to access the CRM while on the road.

sample_tickets.subject: Non-profit discount
sample_tickets.message: Do you offer any discounts for non-profit organizations? We're a registered 501(c)(3) organization.

sample_tickets.subject: Wrong charges
sample_tickets.message: I was charged for 20 users but I only have 15. Can you fix this billing error?

sample_tickets.subject: E-commerce integration
sample_tickets.message: Does your platform integrate with Shopify? We want to sync customer data between both systems.

sample_tickets.subject: Custom fields
sample_tickets.message: I want to create custom fields for our specific industry requirements. How many custom fields can we create per contact?

sample_tickets.subject: Refund request
sample_tickets.message: I want to cancel my subscription and get a refund. I'm not satisfied with the service.

sample_tickets.subject: API rate limits
sample_tickets.message: I'm hitting API rate limits during data sync. Is there a way to increase the limit for our account?

sample_tickets.subject: Automation workflows
sample_tickets.message: How can I set up automation for follow-up emails when prospects don't respond to initial outreach?

sample_tickets.subject: Account suspension
sample_tickets.message: My account is suspended. What happened and how do I get it reactivated?

sample_tickets.subject: SSO Setup
sample_tickets.message: We want to implement Single Sign-On (SSO) for our team. Do you support SAML 2.0?

sample_tickets.subject: Custom dashboard
sample_tickets.message: Can I create a custom dashboard that shows specific metrics that matter to my marketing team?
